name: Grimfang · IL 3400
notes: Whispered to have been carved from the very bones of beasts now long extinct, this rare bow avails from old whispers about. Once marked, no quarry escapes the inevitable end. Artifact Equipment. Cannot Discard.

name: Grimfang · IL 3750
notes: Set Impending Doom unlocks at this tier.

name: Grimfang · IL 4450
notes: +50 Damage; gains Combat Advantage stat at this IL.

name: Grimfang · IL 4800
setBonus: 2 of Set: Accumulate 13 Charges to consume them and become Unleashed. Charged by: 1 charge per Daily power (10s CD), 1 charge per Encounter power (1.5s CD), 1 charge per 3s in combat. Unleashed grants: +4.5% Base Damage Boost. Charges and Unleashed lasts 20s and are refreshable. Leaving combat removes all Charges.

name: Grimfang · IL 5250
notes: Artifact Equipment Maximum Quality. Recommended.

name: Harrowed Messengers · IL 4450
notes: Modification: This slot will hold a bonus statistic chosen from a selection of the special statistics given by Epic and higher rarity artifact weapons. Select 'Manage Artifact Modifications' to select which statistic is slotted. Modification: This slot will hold an enhancement to one of the 10 Class Features of your class.

name: Phantom's Mark
setBonus: 2 of Set: While in Thay, your Movement Speed is increased by 12% and your Damage is increased by 3%. Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Severity, up to a maximum of 5%.
notes: Binds on Pickup (Account), Binds on Equip (Character). A hunter's secret weapon, imbued with the essence of spectral beasts. It sharpens the senses, ensuring that no prey escapes notice.

name: Phantom Fang
setBonus: 2 of Set: While in Thay, your Movement Speed is increased by 12% and your Damage is increased by 3%. Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Severity, up to a maximum of 5%.
notes: Binds on Pickup (Account), Binds on Equip (Character). Forged from the spine of an ancient predator, this bow thirsts for the hunt. When the arrows reach their target, they fracture, rupturing anything they strike.

name: Deadshot's Mark
setBonus: 2 of Set: While in Thay, your Movement Speed is increased by 5%. Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Severity, up to a maximum of 5%.
notes: An inscribed hunting totem, carried by rangers of old. It sharpens the senses, ensuring that no prey escapes notice.

name: Phantom's Bite
setBonus: 2 of Set: While in Thay, your Movement Speed is increased by 5%. Your current Hit Points increases your Critical Severity, up to a maximum of 5%.
notes: A bow crafted from bleached wood and veined with eerie silver. Arrows released from it seem to leave behind a momentary afterimage before striking their prey.

name: Bloodveil Blades of the Thayan Zealot

Each stack grants the following bonuses: General: +0.25% Power, DPS: +0.5% Critical Severity, Healer: +0.5% Overall Outgoing Healing, Tank: +0.5% Awareness. Max 10 stacks.

equipBonuses.description: When you damage your target for more than 20% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your enemy suffers -8% Critical Severity, while you gain +8% Critical Severity for 8 seconds (10 second cooldown).

notes: Recommended. Reinforced: Empty.
